name: PopCaddie - Mobile Golf Simulator
about: PopCaddie is a mobile golf simulator rental service operating throughout Southern California. They bring a state-of-the-art golf simulator setup directly to client locations, including backyards, business venues, and other unique event spaces. The service is designed to provide a complete and immersive golf experience for a wide range of events, handling all logistics from setup to takedown. Their offering is ideal for corporate events, private parties, fundraisers, and golf product launches, providing a unique activity that enhances guest engagement and entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient mobile service that brings the golf simulator to any event location
Premium GSPro software with realistic graphics and global course selection
Full-service rental including all equipment, setup, and on-site support staff

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned; events are BYO.
No on-site alcohol service mentioned; events are BYO.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, PopCaddie provides a standard right-handed golf set with each rental. You are also welcome to bring your own clubs, as their simulators are compatible with all standard sets. Additional sets, including left-handed, ladies', and kids' clubs, are available for rent.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, as a mobile rental service, PopCaddie operates at your event location. You are responsible for providing your own food and drinks for guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play a full 18 holes on their simulator, as this can vary based on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is PopCaddie kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, PopCaddie is suitable for all skill levels, including children. They offer kids' golf club sets for rent and explicitly mention birthdays and family gatherings as ideal events for their service.
